since_last: 61% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.90%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +1.06% · Gold +0.36% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 61% of 87 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.90%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.90%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.26%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.26%, QCOM +10.56%, LRCX +6.33%, AMAT +5.95%, ARM +5.83%. Laggards: BABA -2.81%, EQIX -2.63%, NOW -1.26%, BIDU -1.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.66% at $157.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
